operator_action_required: IB Gateway health check latency (8.2s) exceeds dangerous_ms threshold (750ms). This measures connect/disconnect overhead not order ack latency. Consider reconfiguring chad-ibkr-health to use a persistent connection for latency measurement before live promotion.
